job.title: Infrastructure as Code Consultant
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: As an Infrastructure as Code Consultant, you help our clients automate and codify their infrastructures. You are an expert in IaC and DevOps practices.
mission.1: Design and deploy infrastructure as code (Terraform, Ansible)
mission.3: Set up CI/CD pipelines for infrastructure
mission.5: Documenter les architectures et les pratiques
mission.6: Monitor technological developments in the IaC ecosystem
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in computer science
profile.2: 3 to 6 years of experience in systems administration and IaC
profile.4: Experience with AWS, Azure, or GCP
profile.5: Good DevOps culture and automation mindset
